touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Sophia Anderson introducing our AI meeting assistant and value prop around rep productivity. No response received.
Follow-up cold email with case study on sales team productivity gains. No response received.
Connected with Sophia on cold call. She expressed interest in solving manual note-taking burden for her sales team. Currently evaluating Fathom but open to alternatives. Agreed to send more info.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to look at meeting assistant tools right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our reps are spending too much time on post-call admin work instead of selling. We need better automation.

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with product deck and ROI calculator. Sophia responded asking about integration with their current tech stack (Salesforce, Outreach).

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce and Outreach?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both. Can show you on a call.

next_steps: Book discovery call to demo integrations

touches.ai_summary: Confirmation email for upcoming discovery call. Sophia confirmed and mentioned she's comparing a few options including Fathom.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Sophia. Walked through their workflow challenges with 11 reps manually logging calls. Demoed our automation features and CRM sync. She's interested in unlimited automation tier. Currently has Fathom demo scheduled as well.

questions_asked.question: How many seats would you need to start with?
questions_asked.answer: 11 reps on the sales team, so probably all of them.

questions_asked.question: What differentiates you from Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation workflows and deeper CRM integration capabilities. Fathom is more basic transcription.

next_steps: Send proposal for 11 seats, unlimited automation tier

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call. Presented $9,700 ACV pricing for 11 seats with unlimited automation. Sophia likes the features but wants to validate with her team before moving forward. Mentioned budget approval shouldn't be an issue at this level.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a smaller pilot group first?
questions_asked.answer: We recommend full team rollout for best adoption, but can discuss phased approach.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to sign off on this decision?
questions_asked.answer: It's within my budget authority, but I'll want to get buy-in from the team.

next_steps: Sophia to share with sales team

touches.ai_summary: Call to discuss team feedback and next steps. Sophia confirmed team is on board and likes the automation capabilities. She's still comparing final pricing with Fathom. No executive sponsor has been looped in yet, which may be a gap for procurement process.

questions_asked.question: Should we bring in your VP or CRO to discuss strategic value?
questions_asked.answer: Not necessary at this stage. This is my domain and within my approval range.

questions_asked.question: What's your implementation timeline look like?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 1-2 weeks with your team size. We handle most of the technical setup.

questions_asked.question: Do you offer any onboarding support?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, dedicated onboarding specialist plus ongoing support included in your plan.

objections: Need to finalize Fathom comparison before committing

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call. Sophia asked if we can match Fathom's pricing which is coming in lower. Discussed value differentiation around automation. She's pushing for 10-15% discount to close this week. Single-threaded nature of deal is apparent as no other stakeholders involved.

questions_asked.question: Can you get closer to Fathom's pricing? They're about 20% lower.
questions_asked.answer: Our automation capabilities justify the premium, but let me see what flexibility I have.

questions_asked.question: If we can find some room on price, can you commit this week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, if the number works I'm ready to move forward.

next_steps: Rep to check on discount approval
Sophia to get final budget confirmation

touches.ai_summary: Email with revised proposal at 8% discount to $8,925 ACV. Emphasized ROI and automation features Fathom doesn't offer. Awaiting Sophia's response.
next_steps: Target close by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on revised pricing. Sophia responded that she's still reviewing internally and needs a few more days. Timeline slipping slightly but still engaged.

questions_asked.question: Any blockers we can help address?
questions_asked.answer: No blockers, just need to finalize everything on our end. Will update you early next week.
